## New Template: `<template-name>`

**Description:** What does this template create?

**Language/Framework:**

## Checklist

- [ ] Directory is at repo root, named in kebab-case
- [ ] `template.toml` has name, description, and min_fledge_version
- [ ] At least one `.tera` file exists
- [ ] `README.md.tera` included
- [ ] Tested with `fledge init <name> -t ./<template> --dry-run`
- [ ] Tested full init with `fledge init <name> -t ./<template>`
